manual.teacher.login.title: Login & Dashboard
manual.teacher.login.summary: Sign in at /teacher and overview of controls
manual.teacher.login.s1.heading: Sign in
manual.teacher.login.s1.step3: Enter Firebase Auth password and sign in
manual.teacher.login.s2.heading: Dashboard
manual.teacher.login.s2.body: After login you see classroom status, Pre-Test settings, announcements, and help video.
manual.teacher.classroom.title: Classroom Controls
manual.teacher.classroom.summary: Unlock lessons, Post-Test, and Pre-Test rules in realtime
manual.teacher.classroom.s1.heading: Room status
manual.teacher.classroom.s1.step1: Toggle lesson content — students see pages 3–11
manual.teacher.classroom.s1.step3: Click Save — students update instantly via Firestore
manual.teacher.classroom.s2.tip: Open /student alongside /teacher to verify realtime updates.
manual.teacher.pretestSettings.title: Pre-Test & Music Settings
manual.teacher.pretestSettings.summary: Require Pre-Test and optional music intro
manual.teacher.pretestSettings.s1.step1: Enable "Require Pre-Test" in the Pre-Test section
manual.teacher.pretestSettings.s2.step2: Pick MP3, set volume, require finish or allow skip
manual.teacher.pretestSettings.s2.warnin: Music applies to Pre-Test only — not Post-Test.
manual.teacher.announcements.title: HTML Announcements & QR
manual.teacher.announcements.summary: Rich announcements and QR code tool
manual.teacher.announcements.s1.heading: HTML mode
manual.teacher.announcements.s1.step2: Paste HTML or use the QR generator
manual.teacher.announcements.s2.heading: QR Generator
manual.teacher.announcements.s2.body: Enter URL → generate QR → insert into announcement.
manual.teacher.video.title: Help Video
manual.teacher.video.s1.body: ~7 minute walkthrough. Use "Open fullscreen video" for the Camtasia player.
manual.teacher.troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
manual.teacher.troubleshooting.s1.step2: Wait a moment or refresh the student tab
manual.teacher.troubleshooting.s2.body: Verify username admin and password in Firebase Auth Console.
manual.teacher.troubleshooting.s3.body: Check internet connection and refresh — Unsplash images need online access.
